text.title: experimentation-at-scale Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for experimentation-at-scale as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Experimentation graveyards: large experiment counts with no learning-extraction step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: 100k tests per year without a weekly learning-extraction pass produces a write-only registry. The organizational value of experimentation is in the applied learnings, not the count.

failure-mode.description: Agent paraphrasing confidence intervals as "95% chance of winning."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: That is a Bayesian posterior, not a frequentist CI. Force the agent to copy vendor-emitted statistics verbatim; never let it re-state them in its own words.

failure-mode.description: Hypothesis-author producing "we should redesign onboarding" instead of a behavioral prediction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Solution-shaped hypotheses cannot be falsified. Constrain to Hypothesis-If-Then-Because schema with a numeric MDE field.

failure-mode.description: Metric-watcher posting "trending positive" messages that humans interpret as ship signals.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Label every non-decisional daily update explicitly: "Non-decisional; sequential testing not enabled. Minimum runtime not reached." Prevents premature ships.

failure-mode.description: Learning-extractor emitting a learning bullet from a single null result.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require N >= 5 closed experiments sharing a theme before emitting a learning bullet. Single results are evidence, not learnings.

failure-mode.description: API keys for LaunchDarkly/Statsig inlined in the model context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Route credentials through the host environment, never into the model context window. Credentials in context leak to logs, caches, and prompt libraries.

failure-mode.description: Flag-deployer creating duplicate experiments on retry.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require an idempotency key (hash of experiment-id) on every vendor API call. Retries without idempotency keys create double-counted exposure events.
